fields.helpText: This is a charge from the INTEGRATED BILLING ACTION file that can not be  automatically released from hold by the ePayments nightly process at the current time, due to the debtor having an open pre-payment.  The charge will be removed from the 'QUEUE' by the nightly process when there is no longer an open pre-payment, or the charge is no longer on hold.
This field contain the third party bill related to the first party charge.
This is the date and time the record was added to the system.
The ERA DETAIL field will contain a reference to the ERA detail in  sub-file 344.41 which conatined a payment for the third party bill  related to the first party charge.
The RECEIPT TRANSACTION field will contain a reference to the Receipt Transaction in sub-file 344.01 which contained a payment for the third-party bill related to the first- party charge.
